description_zh: 從 Python 函式簽章和文件字串自動產生 pytest 相容的單元測試範本。
original_description: Automatically generates pytest-compatible unit test templates from Python function signatures and docstrings.

title: neo-py2py3-converter
description: Automatically converts legacy Python 2 code to Python 3 with compatibility checks and test generation.
description_zh: 透過相容性檢查和測試生成，自動將舊版 Python 2 程式碼轉換為 Python 3。
original_description: Automatically converts legacy Python 2 code to Python 3 with compatibility checks and test generation.

title: neo-python-to-go-converter
description: Automatically converts Python code to optimized Go code for performance-critical applications.
description_zh: 自動將 Python 程式碼轉換為針對效能關鍵型應用程式最佳化的 Go 程式碼。
original_description: Automatically converts Python code to optimized Go code for performance-critical applications.

title: nexwave-gateway

original_description: Unified crosschain USDC balance via Circle Gateway + Circle Programmable Wallets.

title: personaldatahub

title: sixel-email

description_zh: 代理程式的 1:1 電子郵件通道 — 代理只能向一個位址傳送電子郵件，且只有該位址可以傳送電子郵件給代理。
original_description: 1:1 email channel for agents — the agent can only email one address, and only that address can email the agent.

description_zh: 透過 VirusTotal 自動驗證「可疑」技能，並透過 Bridge 將其添加到安全白名單中。
original_description: Automatically verify "suspicious" skills via VirusTotal and add them to the security allowlist via the Bridge.

original_description: Audit agent skills for security threats before installing them.
